We offer affordable hair transplant procedures starting at affordable price at our Rohini clinic. This includes expert consultation, customized treatment planning, and post-procedure follow-up care. Which hair transplant techniques are available at your Rohini clinic – FUE or FUT? At our Rohini-based clinic, we specialize in the advanced FUE (Follicular Unit Extraction) technique. It’s minimally invasive, ensures faster healing, and delivers a natural look without visible scarring. What is PRP hair treatment and is it available in your Rohini clinic? Yes, we offer PRP (Platelet-Rich Plasma) therapy at our clinic in Rohini. It’s a non-surgical treatment that uses your own blood to stimulate hair growth, ideal for early-stage hair thinning and hair loss. Do you offer laser hair removal and acne scar treatment in Rohini? Absolutely! Our Rohini clinic provides advanced laser hair removal, acne scar treatment, pigmentation reduction, and more. Treatments are tailored to suit all skin types with visible, lasting results. How do I book a consultation at Goyal Skin & Hair Clinic in Rohini? You can easily book a consultation by calling us directly or filling out the appointment form on our website. Walk-ins are also welcome at our Rohini clinic during working hours. How long does it take to see results after a PRP hair treatment in Rohini? PRP results typically start to show within 3 to 6 weeks, with significant improvement visible after 3 to 6 sessions. Our Rohini clinic provides a tailored PRP schedule based on your hair condition. What is the recovery time after a hair transplant in Rohini? Most patients can resume work within 2–3 days. Full healing and hair regrowth may take a few months. Our clinic in Rohini provides detailed post-op instructions to ensure fast and safe recovery. Are your skin and hair treatments suitable for both men and women in Rohini? Absolutely.
